notice: This contract connects the vault registrar to the Securitize Registrar, allowing vaults to be registered

change_authorized_contract(address,bool).notice: Change the authorization status of a single contract.

register_vault(address,address).notice: Register a vault with the vault registrar for a given investor wallet.

params.contract_address: The address of the contract to change authorization for.
params.authorized: The new authorization status for the contract.

params.vault: The address of the vault to register.
params.investor_wallet: The address of the investor wallet associated with the vault.
